char_threshold.description: Minimum text length (characters) to trigger rendering.

score_threshold.description: Minimum markdown score to trigger rendering. Higher values require more markdown syntax.

render_timeout.description: Maximum time (seconds) to wait for a single render.

footer.description: Footer text shown at bottom of rendered images. Leave empty to hide.

llm_only.description: Only render LLM responses. When enabled, command outputs (e.g. /help) are not rendered.
